title: The Red Key
description: The texture pack used for the Red Key organisation on TTRP.
body:
**Requires CIT/Optifine**
 

This texture pack was specifically designed for a group on a roleplay server known as **Tall Tales RP (TTRP)** who's aims are to restore the nature within it's main continent.

Within the pack are cosmetic items, which **offer no aid to the user's experiences** in the game however will add a nice touch of detail to any world!

 
The pack includes 5 items as of the first version, which are as follows:

v1 adds:
> (paper) Red Key
> 
> (paper) Red Scroll
> 
> (paper) Mask of the Red Key
> 
> (red tulip) Spider Lily
> 
> (paper) Smug

v2 adds:
> (paper) Robes of the Red Key
> 
> (iron sword) Blade of the Red Key

v3 adds:
> (stick) Cane of the Red Key
> 
> (paper) Hat of the Red Key 
> 
>         + Panorama Overlay
> 
>         + Splash Text

v4 adds:
> (iron sword) Rapier of the Red Key
> 
> (iron sword) Shortsword of the Red Key
> 
> (netherite axe) Halberd of the Red Key

v5 adds:
> (iron sword) Claymore of the Red Key
> 
> (trident) Trident of the Red Key (REMOVED)
> 
> (white wool) Bearded Dragon Plush

v6 adds:
> (white wool) Bearded Dragon Plush
>           (retextured & remodeled)
> 
> (white wool) Rev's Deer Plush & Deer Plush
> 
> (white wool) Jane's Tabby Cat Plush & Tabby Cat Plush
> 
> (paper) Hera's Macarons
> 
> (stick) Cross of the Shattered
> 
> (iron sword) Endbringer
> 
> (diamond sword) The Artisan's Quill
> 
> (iron sword) Roseblade of Elysium
> 
> (oak log) Dark Guitar
> 
> (oak log) Light Guitar
> 
>         + Black Horse retexture

v7 adds & fixes:
> (paper) Hat of the Red Key
> 
> (bread) Hera's Macarons
> 
> (white wool) Dragonfly
> 
> (paper) Mask of the Red Key
> 
> (iron axe & netherite axe) Halberd of the Red Key
> 
> (iron sword & netherite sword) Claymore of the Red Key
> 
> (iron sword) The Red Herring
> 
> (white wool) Bobber
> 
> (white wool) Anchor

(Any and all GUI aside from Overlay, Edition and Fonts are from Default Dark Mode - Minecraft Resource Packs - CurseForge - I wholly recommend getting the original pack!)

Have fun!
